description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image and a single build stage. Add a build job named build that runs the following script commands in order: npm install -g electron-packager vulcanize electron-prebuilt bower; cd polymer && bower update --allow-root; cd elements && vulcanize -o elements.vulcanized.html elements.html --strip-comments --inline-scripts --inline-css && cd ..; cp bower_components/webcomponentsjs/webcomponents-lite.js scripts/webcomponents-lite.js; rm -rf bower_components; cd .. && electron-packager . --all --out=builds --overwrite --version=0.37.5. The job should publish the builds/ directory as an artifact and include untracked files. The pipeline runs automatically on all branches.
